subcodes.first_line: O speaking leaf! Praise be to God that thou hast witnessed, with thine own eyes, the power divine and the resplendent signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه ناطقه حمد خدا را که قدرت الهیه را بعین راس مشاهده نمودی و ایات باهرات
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
